title: Cleanest 2-folder (GOVERNING/DERIVED); archive kept zipped
public_claim: Cleanest 2-folder (GOVERNING/DERIVED); archive kept zipped is a source packet for this is the documentation-only handoff dossier that flattens governance into a two-layer split: (1) governing source docs — 12 curated inputs preserved as evidence — and (2) derived handoff docs — 10 numbered analytic/decision documents produced from them.
distinctive_mechanism: It converts an archive or handoff into three inspectable decisions: what the work product is for, which component pieces carry the work, and what action would turn it into a live room, paper, method, or software instrument.
use_value: It preserves the distinctive design logic for Cleanest 2-folder (GOVERNING/DERIVED); archive kept zipped, so the portfolio can show the actual mechanism and status instead of reducing the project to a file-count or handoff label.
